response.original_title: Pinocchio (mal)visto dal Gatto e la Volpe
response.overview: Ugo Gregoretti and Andrea Camilleri, renowned writers and longtime friends, have fun dressing up and playing the roles of the Cat (Gregoretti) and the Fox (Camilleri) in this surprising adaptation of *Pinocchio*, told entirely in rhyming verse and song.
response.title: Pinocchio (mal)visto dal Gatto e la Volpe
